name: logia_memory
description: Portable agent memory service. Use this to persistently remember facts, recall past context, or reflect on your memory history. Memories are version-controlled markdown files you own. Call with your agent username as agentId.

agentId.description: Your agent username (e.g. 'my-agent'). This scopes your memory so only you can access it.

action.description: 'remember' stores a fact, 'recall' searches your memories, 'reflect' shows overview + history

content.description: For remember: the fact to store. For recall: search query. Not needed for reflect.

category.description: Optional. 'notes' for facts, 'interactions' for event logs, 'preferences' for habits/patterns.
